Course Title: AI in Payment and Fraud Detection
Category: Hospitality & Tourism: Hotels, Tourism, Travel Agencies, Food & Beverage
Who is this for: Hotel managers, front desk staff, reservations agents, restaurant managers, travel agents, booking coordinators, customer service representatives, payment processors, hospitality supervisors
Team or Dept this is for: Operations, Customer Service, Finance, Revenue Management, Front Office, Food & Beverage, Reservations
Description: Balancing fraud prevention with customer friction.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with everyday payment processes (such as taking card payments or handling online bookings) and a general interest in how technology supports customer service in hospitality and travel are all that is required to get started.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify common fraud patterns in hospitality and travel payment systems and explain how AI tools are used to detect and prevent them. You will also apply practical strategies to balance robust fraud prevention with a smooth, low-friction experience for your customers.
